monitor_the_situation.title: Sirens Blare Across Kuwait Amid Iran Strikes
— S4 · Conflict · Kuwait · 8h ago. Air raid sirens sounded across Kuwait after Iranian missile and drone strikes, as US military claims retaliation.

US Strikes Iran for Eighth Night; Iran Hits Kuwait, Bahrain in Retaliation, 2 US Soldiers Killed in Jordan Drone Attack, 1 Missing, Escalating Regional Conflict, US and Iran Exchange Strikes, IRGC Tar
US Strikes Targets Southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan, Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Ahvaz, Khuzestan, Iran · 15h ago. US airstrikes hit targets southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan Province, southwestern Iran, according to Tasnim News Agency, amid ongoing US-Iran war.
US Launches Airstrikes on Iran in Strait of Hormuz
